Still Used Today

What Is This?

CNMemes is the most comprehensive English-language dictionary of Chinese internet memes and viral expressions. Covering memes from the early 2000s to today and updated monthly, each entry includes detailed explanations, cultural context, and real-world usage examples.

Why Does This Exist?

Chinese internet culture is one of the richest and most creative in the world — but most of it is invisible to English speakers. When someone says "yyds" or "内卷" or "显眼包," there's a whole universe of meaning, history, and social context packed into those characters. CNMemes bridges that gap.

Whether you're learning Chinese, working with Chinese colleagues, following Chinese media, or just curious about what's trending on Weibo and Douyin, this dictionary explains not just what these words mean — but why they matter.

How Each Entry Works

Every meme includes: the Chinese original, pinyin pronunciation, an English equivalent, a plain-English explanation written for people with zero China background, cultural context explaining the social forces behind the meme, example sentences showing real usage, and for the most viral memes, an origin story tracing exactly where and how it started.

Update Schedule

New memes are added monthly. We track Chinese social media trends across Weibo, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, and Bilibili. If you see a meme missing, email us and we'll add it.

RSS Feed

Subscribe to our RSS feed to get the latest memes delivered to your reader.

Contact

Found an error? Have a meme suggestion? Want to collaborate? Reach out at whycici@gmail.com.
